title: Update menu item images: Porsian (5pcs), Party Pack 40pcs (40pcs), Party Pack 50pcs (50pcs)

requirements.summary: Update the Porsian menu item image to show 5 pieces of dimsum
acceptanceCriteria: The Porsian menu card displays a new image depicting 5 pieces of dimsum.
The image is saved as a generated static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated.

file_operations.description: Update the Porsian menu card to reference the newly generated image frontend/public/assets/generated/porsian-menu.dim_600x400.png instead of the current image. Verify the image path matches the generated asset exactly.

requirements.summary: Update the Party Pack 40pcs menu item image to show 40 pieces of dimsum
acceptanceCriteria: The Party Pack 40pcs menu card displays a new image depicting 40 pieces of dimsum.
The image is saved as a generated static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated.

file_operations.description: Update the Party Pack 40pcs menu card to reference the newly generated image frontend/public/assets/generated/party-pack-40pcs-menu.dim_600x400.png instead of the current image. Verify the image path matches the generated asset exactly.

requirements.summary: Update the Party Pack 50pcs menu item image to show 50 pieces of dimsum
acceptanceCriteria: The Party Pack 50pcs menu card displays a new image depicting 50 pieces of dimsum.
The image is saved as a generated static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated.

file_operations.description: Update the Party Pack 50pcs menu card to reference the newly generated image frontend/public/assets/generated/party-pack-50pcs-menu.dim_600x400.png instead of the current image. Verify the image path matches the generated asset exactly.

requirements.summary: Render the three newly generated menu images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them in Menu.tsx for the Porsian, Party Pack 40pcs, and Party Pack 50pcs menu cards respectively
acceptanceCriteria: Menu.tsx imports and displays porsian-menu.png for the Porsian card.
Menu.tsx imports and displays party-pack-40pcs-menu.png for the Party Pack 40pcs card.
Menu.tsx imports and displays party-pack-50pcs-menu.png for the Party Pack 50pcs card.
All three images load without errors in the browser.

file_operations.description: Import the three generated images (frontend/public/assets/generated/porsian-menu.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/party-pack-40pcs-menu.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/party-pack-50pcs-menu.dim_600x400.png) and ensure each menu card correctly references its corresponding new image. Verify all image paths are correct and that no other menu properties (name, price, description, ingredients) are modified.
